Use the provided chibi Avilia reference as the character identity anchor.

Scene: Avilia stamps a blank page with a command seal labeled "hexo new". A new article card pops out of a small terminal box.

Core meaning: creating a new post is the first writing action in Hexo.

Style: clean technical blog illustration, lots of white space, black/red/white, small blue terminal cursor. Minimal labels: "new post", "写作入口".
